goal.primary_objective: Lose fat while preserving muscle mass
goal.strategy: High protein floor, sufficient carbs for performance, fat fills remainder under calorie ceiling

nutrition_targets.notes: Protein is the hard constraint. Carbs are the performance lever — enough to sustain training and daily activity. Fat fills remaining calories. Specific carb/fat gram counts are secondary to hitting protein floor and staying under calorie ceiling.

routine.structure: 6-day push/pull/cardio split with 1 full rest day. Days are positional (Day 1-7), not calendar-locked.

exercises.name: Standing Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Perform before bench press — permanent order change this cycle. Significant performance improvement observed after reorder. Recently increased from 75 lbs.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Recent PR during cut. No spotter — conservative approach. Do not push to failure without safety measures.

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Grip just inside shoulder width. Monitor elbow flare on final set when fatigued.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.notes: Slow eccentric 2-3 sec, pause at top. Pinky and elbow lead, slight forward lean, weights slightly in front of midline. Technique corrected this cycle — significant improvement in stimulus.

exercises.name: Tricep Extension / Pushdown
exercises.notes: Newly added this cycle for arm aesthetics. Working weight not yet established — log first session weight when performed.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Recent PR. Belt required. Pause and reset between reps acceptable on heavy sets. Bracing cue: form a second belt with abs underneath the weightlifting belt.

exercises.name: Pause Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3-second pause at bottom. Belt required. Planned progression to 175 lbs next appropriate session.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Belt and straps. Full ROM, controlled eccentric.

exercises.name: Overhead Plate Lunges
exercises.notes: Stationary lunges. 45 lb plate held overhead. Core bracing critical — plate must stay directly overhead throughout.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.notes: Feet close together, balls of feet elevated on weight plate for full ROM. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel
exercises.notes: Perform from knees until consistently hitting 10+ reps before progressing to standing. Lower back must not take over — abs fail first or end the set. Expect significant progression over coming weeks.

exercises.name: Flutter Kicks
exercises.notes: Optional finisher after ab wheel. Back flat against floor throughout — end set if lumbar lifts. Press lower back actively into floor.

cardio_options.name: Jump Rope Intervals
cardio_options.structure: 2 min work / 90 sec rest, 8 rounds (16 min working time)

cardio_options.name: KB Swings + Burpees
cardio_options.structure: 5 rounds: 20 American swings (53 lb KB) + 10 burpees / 90 sec rest
cardio_options.notes: American swing style — full overhead. Schedule away from upper body days to avoid pre-fatiguing traps and biceps.

exercises.name: Bent Over Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Supinated (underhand) grip. Belt required. 4x8 achieved consistently — approaching progression to 165 lbs.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-ups
exercises.notes: 25 lb dip belt. Progressed 4x5 → 4x6 → 4x7 across three sessions. Next milestone: 4x8, then advance to 30 lbs.

exercises.name: Single Arm KB Row
exercises.notes: 53 lb kettlebell. Alternating arms, 1-2 min rest between sets. Most recent: 10, 8, 9.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.notes: Same tempo cues as Day 1. Most recent: 11, 10, 10.

exercises.name: Hammer Curls
exercises.notes: Cross-body variation — raises across body to sternum. Newly added this cycle. First session: 3x9 with slow eccentric and pause at top.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Belt and straps. Assess on warmup — on fatigued days 275 is working weight, on good days 285 is appropriate. Let warmup dictate the session weight.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Belt and straps. Most recent: 3x12. FLAGGED: Recommendation to replace this instance with a leg curl or Nordic curl variation to reduce RDL frequency — currently appears on both lower days.

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.notes: 2-3 second isometric hold at top. External rotation cue — drive knees slightly outward at top.

exercises.name: Lunges
exercises.notes: Stationary. Can be loaded progressively as fitness improves.

day_6.label: Cardio / Active Recovery (Optional)
day_6.notes: Same options as Day 3. This day is optional — skip entirely if cumulative fatigue is high. A full passive rest day is always valid.
day_6.ab_wheel: Optional second ab wheel session if energy permits.

day_7.label: Full Rest
day_7.notes: No training, no cardio. Prioritize sleep, hydration, and higher carbohydrate intake to refuel for the following week.

progression_flags: Pause Back Squat: plan to progress to 175 lbs next appropriate session
Bent Over Row: approaching 165 lbs — watch for 4x8 milestone
Weighted Pull-ups: at 4x7 — next milestone 4x8, then advance to 30 lbs
Tricep Extension: working weight not yet established
Day 5 RDL: flagged for replacement with leg curl or Nordic curl variation
Ab Wheel: building from knees — target 10+ consistent reps before progressing to standing
